summary: Task 1 is a clean strings-only plumbing change: 10 new Russian keys added to app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml under a new section comment, placed after the About block. All AC items 1-9 from the task file are met: naming (snake_case + contextual prefixes crash_report_*, crash_banner_*, about_diagnostics_*, dev_crash_dialog_*, log_export_*), tone (no emoji, no '!', no 'пожалуйста', imperative buttons, single-sentence error without apology/retry-hint), punctuation (period on full sentences; no period on Toast/Snackbar values), and reuse (btn_close and btn_cancel reused, log_export_save_button shared across CrashReport/Banner/About) all comply with the spec. No XML issues (no unescaped apostrophes/quotes/ampersands, no duplicate name attributes, app_name unchanged, no unrelated edits).

acChecklist.8_build_green: pass (reported in prompt: assembleDebug BUILD SUCCESSFUL, 66 unit tests green)
acChecklist.9_lint_no_new_warnings_except_expected_u: pass (transient UnusedResources expected per task note)

notes.verdict: Approved without changes. Ready for Wave 2 tasks (4, 6, 7) to reference R.string.* keys.
